# Test PostgreSQL server tool definitions
exec go run . "postgres://invalid" --timeout=5s
stdin tools_request.json
wait 5s
stdout '"tools"'
stdout '"list_tables"'
stdout '"describe_table"'  
stdout '"execute_query"'
stdout '"list_schemas"'
stdout '"arguments"'

-- tools_request.json --
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"tools/list"}
